message:
feat(ffs-ondisk): btrfs internal node parsing + header validation (bd-1fo)

Add BtrfsKeyPtr type and parse_internal_items() for internal (level>0)
tree nodes, plus BtrfsHeader::validate() for bytenr/nritems/level
bounds checking. 10 new tests cover malformed item tables, overflow,
and zero block pointers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
